Bash(node -e "const p = require\('C:/nvm4w/nodejs/node_modules/pptxgenjs'\); const pp = new p\(\); console.log\(Object.keys\(pp.shapes\).filter\(k=>k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('diamond'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('rect'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('oval'\)\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('C:/nvm4w/nodejs/node_modules/pptxgenjs'\); const pp = new p\(\); const shapes = Object.keys\(pp.ShapeType || pp.shapes || {}\); console.log\(shapes.filter\(s => s.includes\('DIAM'\) || s.includes\('diam'\) || s.includes\('TRI'\) || s.includes\('PENT'\) || s.includes\('CHEVR'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\); console.log\('Total shapes:', shapes.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('C:/nvm4w/nodejs/node_modules/pptxgenjs'\); const pp = new p\(\); const shapes = pp.ShapeType || pp.shapes || {}; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({diamond: shapes.diamond, rect: shapes.RECTANGLE, oval: shapes.OVAL, rounded: shapes.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE}\)\);")
